_about: Classifies each RENDERED output path. framework = re-rendered by `make update` (update.py protects local edits via *.rp-new). project = seeded once at init, never re-rendered. conditional = framework-owned only when `when` holds, else not produced. ignore = never produced. Most-specific glob wins; '**' spans directories, '*' spans one segment.

rules._comment: operating engine: modes, rules, prompt-factory, guard contract, timing, etc.
fully framework; fast-summary is a pointer to project-status
language policy + generic operating terms; PRJ terms section grows in place
generic verdict vocabulary + viz method; metric section is a seeded scaffold
the clone's own README, rendered from README.clone.md.tmpl
catch-all: accumulating project state (status, comparison, records, backlog bodies, method/concept bodies, debugging, related-work)
